CVE-2025-48172.title: CHMLib through 2bef8d0, as used in SumatraPDF and other products, ...
CVE-2025-48172.description: CHMLib through 2bef8d0, as used in SumatraPDF and other products, has a chm_lib.c _chm_decompress_block integer overflow. There is a resultant heap-based buffer overflow in _chm_fetch_bytes.
